H

Zanz_Codex

Powered by Groq • zanz_codex

Halo, saya {{ AI_DISPLAY_NAME }}

Saya AI assistant Zanz_Codex, siap membantu Anda! 🚀

Click the ⚙️ in the sidebar to add your Groq API key

{{ error }}

Responses are generated by AI and may not be accurate.

Settings

Your key is stored in localStorage and sent directly to Groq API.

Leave empty to call Groq directly. Set a proxy URL to keep your API key server-side.
'); h = h.replace(/^\d+\. (.+)$/gm, '
  • $1
    • '); h = h.replace(/\n\n/g, '

    '); h = '

    ' + h + '

    '; h = h.replace(/

    <\/p>/g, ''); h = h.replace(/<\/p><(ul|ol|pre|h[1-3]|blockquote|hr)>/g, '

    \n<$1>'); h = h.replace(/<(ul|ol|pre|h[1-3]|blockquote|hr)>

    /g, '<$1>\n

    '); h = h.replace(/<(ul|ol)>

    /g, '<$1>'); h = h.replace(/<\/p><\/(ul|ol)>/g, ''); return h; } const app = createApp({ setup() { const sidebarOpen = ref(window.innerWidth >= 768); const theme = ref(localStorage.getItem('halo_theme') || 'dark'); const showSettings = ref(false); const EMBEDDED_GROQ_KEY = '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'; const proxyUrl = ref(''); const systemPrompt = ref(localStorage.getItem('zanz_system_prompt') || DEFAULT_SYSTEM_PROMPT); const groqApiKey = ref(EMBEDDED_GROQ_KEY); const apiKeyInput = ref(EMBEDDED_GROQ_KEY); const selectedModel = ref(localStorage.getItem('halo_model') || 'llama-3.3-70b-versatile'); const inputText = ref(''); const loading = ref(false); const error = ref(''); const messages = ref([]); const chatHistory = ref(JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('halo_chats') || '[]')); const currentChatIndex = ref(parseInt(localStorage.getItem('halo_current_chat') || '0')); const chatContainer = ref(null); const scrollAnchor = ref(null); const inputEl = ref(null); const models = MODELS; const suggestions = SUGGESTIONS; const modelName = computed(() => { const m = models.find(m => m.id === selectedModel.value); return m ? m.name : selectedModel.value; }); function loadChat() { if (chatHistory.value.length === 0) { messages.value = []; return; } const chat = chatHistory.value[currentChatIndex.value]; messages.value = (chat && chat.messages) ? chat.messages.map(m => ({ ...m, streaming: false })) : []; } function saveChats() { localStorage.setItem('halo_chats', JSON.stringify(chatHistory.value)); localStorage.setItem('halo_current_chat', currentChatIndex.value.toString()); if (chatHistory.value.length > 0 && currentChatIndex.value < chatHistory.value.length) { chatHistory.value[currentChatIndex.value].messages = messages.value.map(m => ({ id: m.id, role: m.role, content: m.content })); const fu = messages.value.find(m => m.role === 'user'); if (fu) chatHistory.value[currentChatIndex.value].title = fu.content.slice(0, 50) + (fu.content.length > 50 ? '...' : ''); } localStorage.setItem('halo_chats', JSON.stringify(chatHistory.value)); } function newChat() { saveChats(); chatHistory.value.push({ title: 'New Chat', messages: [] }); currentChatIndex.value = chatHistory.value.length - 1; messages.value = []; saveChats(); error.value = ''; sidebarOpen.value = window.innerWidth >= 768; } function switchChat(i) { saveChats(); currentChatIndex.value = i; loadChat(); error.value = ''; if (window.innerWidth < 768) sidebarOpen.value = false; } function deleteChat(i) { if (chatHistory.value.length <= 1) { chatHistory.value = []; currentChatIndex.value = 0; messages.value = []; saveChats(); return; } chatHistory.value.splice(i, 1); if (currentChatIndex.value >= chatHistory.value.length) currentChatIndex.value = chatHistory.value.length - 1; loadChat(); saveChats(); } function toggleTheme() { theme.value = theme.value === 'dark' ? 'light' : 'dark'; localStorage.setItem('halo_theme', theme.value); document.documentElement.className = theme.value; } function applyTheme() { document.documentElement.className = theme.value; } function autoResize(e) { e.target.style.height = 'auto'; e.target.style.height = Math.min(e.target.scrollHeight, 160) + 'px'; } function scrollToBottom() { nextTick(() => { if (scrollAnchor.value) scrollAnchor.value.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth' }); }); } function sendSuggestion(text) { inputText.value = text; sendMessage(); } function saveSettings() { const key = apiKeyInput.value.trim(); if (!key) return; groqApiKey.value = key; showSettings.value = false; error.value = ''; if (key !== EMBEDDED_GROQ_KEY) { localStorage.setItem('halo_groq_key', key); } localStorage.setItem('halo_proxy_url', proxyUrl.value.trim()); localStorage.setItem('zanz_system_prompt', systemPrompt.value); } function resetSystemPrompt() { systemPrompt.value = DEFAULT_SYSTEM_PROMPT; } function getApiBase() { const proxy = localStorage.getItem('halo_proxy_url') || ''; return proxy.trim() || ''; } async function sendMessage() { const text = inputText.value.trim(); if (!text || loading.value) return; const apiKey = groqApiKey.value; if (!apiKey) { error.value = 'Please add your Groq API key in Settings (⚙️)'; return; } inputText.value = ''; error.value = ''; if (inputEl.value) inputEl.value.style.height = 'auto'; if (chatHistory.value.length === 0) { chatHistory.value.push({ title: 'New Chat', messages: [] }); currentChatIndex.value = 0; } const uid = Date.now().toString(); const aid = (Date.now() + 1).toString(); messages.value.push({ id: uid, role: 'user', content: text, streaming: false }); const assistantMsg = { id: aid, role: 'assistant', content: '', streaming: true }; messages.value.push(assistantMsg); saveChats(); scrollToBottom(); loading.value = true; const apiMessages = [ { role: 'system', content: systemPrompt.value }, ...messages.value .filter(m => m.role === 'user' || (m.role === 'assistant' && !m.streaming) || (m.role === 'assistant' && m.id === aid)) .map(m => ({ role: m.role, content: m.content || '' })) ]; try { const proxy = getApiBase(); const url = proxy ? `${proxy}/v1/chat/completions` : `${GROQ_API}/chat/completions`; const headers = proxy ? { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' } : { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Authorization': `Bearer ${apiKey}` }; const response = await fetch(url, { method: 'POST', headers, body: JSON.stringify({ model: selectedModel.value, messages: apiMessages, temperature: 0.7, max_tokens: 4096, stream: true, }), }); if (!response.ok) { const errText = await response.text(); let msg = `Error ${response.status}`; try { const j = JSON.parse(errText); msg = j.error?.message || msg; } catch {} throw new Error(msg); } const reader = response.body.getReader(); const decoder = new TextDecoder(); let buffer = ''; while (true) { const { done, value } = await reader.read(); if (done) break; buffer += decoder.decode(value, { stream: true }); const lines = buffer.split('\n'); buffer = lines.pop() || ''; for (const line of lines) { if (!line.startsWith('data: ')) continue; const data = line.slice(6).trim(); if (data === '[DONE]') continue; try { const parsed = JSON.parse(data); const delta = parsed.choices?.[0]?.delta?.content || ''; if (delta) { assistantMsg.content += delta; messages.value = [...messages.value]; scrollToBottom(); } } catch {} } } assistantMsg.streaming = false; messages.value = [...messages.value]; saveChats(); scrollToBottom(); } catch (err) { if (err.name === 'AbortError') return; assistantMsg.content = assistantMsg.content || ''; assistantMsg.streaming = false; messages.value = [...messages.value]; error.value = err.message || 'Failed to fetch — check your API key and try again.'; console.error('Chat error:', err); } finally { loading.value = false; saveChats(); } } watch(theme, () => applyTheme()); watch(selectedModel, v => localStorage.setItem('halo_model', v)); onMounted(() => { applyTheme(); if (chatHistory.value.length > 0) { loadChat(); } else { chatHistory.value.push({ title: 'New Chat', messages: [] }); currentChatIndex.value = 0; } }); return { sidebarOpen, theme, showSettings, groqApiKey, apiKeyInput, proxyUrl, systemPrompt, AI_DISPLAY_NAME, selectedModel, modelName, inputText, loading, error, messages, chatHistory, currentChatIndex, chatContainer, scrollAnchor, inputEl, models, suggestions, newChat, switchChat, deleteChat, toggleTheme, sendMessage, sendSuggestion, renderMarkdown, autoResize, saveSettings, resetSystemPrompt, }; } }); app.mount('#app');
